query:
SELECT 
  g.id,
  g.awayTeam,
  g.homeTeam,
  g.gameTime,
  g.awayBookSpread,
  g.homeBookSpread,
  g.awaySpreadOdds,
  g.homeSpreadOdds,
  g.bookTotal,
  g.overOdds,
  g.underOdds,
  g.awayML,
  g.homeML,
  g.modelAwayScore,
  g.modelHomeScore,
  g.published
FROM games g
WHERE g.sport = 'MLB'
  AND g.gameDate = '2026-03-26'
ORDER BY g.gameTime ASC;
